mapper.select: select a.id as attractionId, a.title, a.addr1, a.addr2, a.overview, a.sido_code as sidoCode, a.gugun_code as gugunCode from attractions a where order by a.id asc limit #{limit}
select count(*) from attraction_embeddings where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and source_version = #{sourceVersion} and source_text_hash = #{sourceTextHash} and status = 'EMBEDDED'
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_embeddings (attraction_id, embedding, source_version, source_text_hash, embedding_dimension, embedding_input, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, embedded_at, updated_at) values (#{attractionId}, #{vectorLiteral}::vector, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceTextHash}, #{dimension}, #{embeddingInput}, #{provider}, #{model}, 'EMBEDDED', null, null, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp) on conflict (attraction_id) do update set embedding = excluded.embedding, source_version = excluded.source_version, source_text_hash = excluded.source_text_hash, embedding_dimension = excluded.embedding_dimension, embedding_input = excluded.embedding_input, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'EMBEDDED', failure_code = null, failure_message = null, attempt_count = attraction_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into attraction_embeddings (attraction_id, source_version, source_text_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, updated_at) values (#{attractionId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceTextHash}, 3072, 'gms', 'text-embedding-3-large', 'FAILED', #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp) on conflict (attraction_id) do update set source_version = excluded.source_version, source_text_hash = excluded.source_text_hash, embedding_dimension = 3072, provider = 'gms', model = 'text-embedding-3-large', status = 'FAILED', embedding = null, failure_code = excluded.failure_code, failure_message = excluded.failure_message, attempt_count = attraction_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select count(*) from attraction_embeddings e join attractions a on e.attraction_id = a.id where not
